name: Common
description: The common spoken language agreed upon by most Mortal Races for commerce and inter-regional communication. Primary language of Lamiiran and Gothrin tribes.

name: Trovan Rune
description: A method of runic writing gifted to mortals by Trovanhim, the god of magic. Required to use magic scrolls.

name: Archaic Northrealm
description: The language of non-elven pre-Age of Conquest civilizations such as the ancient Humans and the Dwarves.

name: Ancient Elven
description: The magical language of the Precursor Age Elven Clans. Speaking or writing words can evoke powerful arcana.

name: Elven
description: A modern elven language mutated from Ancient Elven. Its words maintain some diluted magic power.

name: Celestial
description: Said to be the language used by the gods after Exona. Can not be spoken, only written; its glyphs hold a strange power.

name: Bug
description: The vibration-based languages of insects, including the Dyne. Can be used to speak to Insectoid creatures.

name: Ghostwhisper
description: The telepathic speech of transient spirits anchored to this plane.

name: Jezorian
description: The language of one of the lost tribes of humanity, the Jezoriad.

name: The Midnight Code
description: A language of symbols and markings used by criminal organizations on the Dead Continent.

name: V'almese
description: The language of the Mazmeri used to communicate with their machine-god, Zyzimar and his lesser constructs.

name: Inuvaglyphic
description: The symbol-based language of the Inuvans. Learning this language is the sacred goal of all Inuvanites. Cannot be learned by level up or Custom Trait.
